{
  "sceneId": "scene-6",

  "originalScript": {
    "extract": "INT. NEWSROOM - LIVE FEED PREP - HIGH-KEY AIRY\n\nOverhead flat-lay: terminal screen pulses headline graphic -- clean whites, pink accents, light green glow (#E8F4E8). Reporter adjusts earpiece, golden hour warmth bathes face, natural skin tones pop true-to-life. Quick-cut macro: mic clip snaps tactile-close.\n\nShe straightens, cool poise. Red light blinks LIVE.",

Every frame earns: punchy editorial.\n\n                    REPORTER (V.O.)\n          Breaking: The serum everyone's saving\n          screenshots for. Fresh. Tactile. Yours\n          in hours.",

<DIRECTOR_STYLE>
{
  "mood": "Fresh, sensory, and effortlessly cool",
  "artStyle": "Modern social-first product photography with tactile, editorial energy. Products shown in real-life context -- hands opening packaging, fingers pressing textures, products on bathroom shelves, kitchen counters, rumpled linen. Close-up detail shots emphasize material and finish. Flat-lays with curated minimal arrangements. Color-matched backgrounds that complement the product. Every frame feels like something you would screenshot and save",
  "lighting": "Bright natural window light with clean directional shadows. Direct on-camera flash for punchy editorial energy on select shots. No heavy diffusion -- let light feel real and immediate. Golden hour warmth for lifestyle moments. High-key and airy overall with pops of contrast",
  "colorPalette": [
    "#FFFFFF",
    "#F0E6D3",
    "#D4536D",
    "#1A1A1A",
    "#E8F4E8"
  ],
  "cameraWork": "Dynamic mix of handheld and locked shots with consistent energy. Handheld with natural micro-movement for lifestyle moments -- hands interacting, daily rituals, real context. Quick-cut to locked beauty frames for hero product shots. Macro details on textures and surfaces. Overhead flat-lays directly above. Eye-level and slightly above angles. Shallow depth of field on tactile details. Energetic pacing -- no lingering, every frame earns its time",
  "referenceFilms": [
    "Rhode Skin Instagram",
    "Glossier Visual Identity",
    "Summer Fridays Campaigns",
    "Drunk Elephant Content"
  ],
  "colorGrading": "Clean and bright with true-to-life color. Whites are crisp, skin tones warm and natural. Minimal processing -- the product looks like it does in your hand. Slight warmth in highlights, lifted shadows keeping everything airy. One accent color pops against neutral base"
}
</DIRECTOR_STYLE>

<ASPECT_RATIO>
16:9
</ASPECT_RATIO>

response.content: {"visual":{"fullPrompt":"Wide locked 16:9 cinematic frame capturing rain-slicked window panes foregrounded with textured water streaks and droplets refracting golden hour twilight urban glow, framing a sprawling city skyline alive with distant flickering billboards displaying curated minimal product visuals, subtle atmospheric haze and neon pulses diffusing through the glass creating layered depth, high-key airy lighting with bright natural window light casting clean directional shadows across glossy wet surfaces and warm golden highlights on pane edges, crisp whites and warm beiges dominate with pops of pink and light green accents against matte black silhouettes, shallow depth of field sharpening foreground rain textures while softly bokeh-ing the expansive skyline, modern social-first editorial style inspired by Rhode Skin Instagram and Glossier campaigns, tactile sensory energy in every glossy reflection and subtle micro-movement implying an impending handheld pan, vibrant true-to-life color grading with lifted shadows and immediate real light feel.","negativePrompt":"holograms, floating interfaces, text overlays, subtitles, people, characters, blurry foreground, overexposed highlights, heavy diffusion, flat lighting, deep shadows, unrealistic glows, signage, readable words","components":{"sceneDescription":"Wide locked shot through rain-slicked window framing glowing urban skyline with flickering distant billboards, implying subtle pan motion.","subject":"Rain-slicked window panes and distant city skyline.","environment":"Rain-streaked glass foreground, expansive twilight cityscape with neon billboards in background, atmospheric urban haze.","lighting":"Golden hour twilight urban glow refracting through wet panes, high-key airy with clean directional shadows and warm highlights.","camera":"Wide locked 16:9 framing, shallow depth of field, eye-level through window.","composition":"Foreground glass textures sharp, layered depth to bokeh skyline, balanced urban energy.","style":"Modern editorial product photography like Rhode Skin and Glossier, screenshot-perfect curated minimalism.","technical":"High resolution, detailed textures, immediacy."}},"continuity":{"characterTags":[],"environmentTag":"rainy_city_skyline_window","elementTags":[],"colorPalette":"#FFFFFF, #F0E6D3, #D4536D, #1A1A1A, #E8F4E8","lightingSetup":"golden hour
